title: coryphopteris diversisora
intro: Coryphopteris diversisora, also known as 'Bilu Long' or 'Iron Bamboo', is a species of fern found in tropical regions of Asia and is used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high iron content. The health benefits of Coryphopteris diversisora include reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or combined with other herbs to create medicinal remedies.
